objective: opencodex 미커밋 작업 세트(41 files, v2 게이트/v1v2 카탈로그/ultra 주입/management API/cursor 어댑터) 배포급 하드닝: WP1 적대적 리뷰(서브에이전트 3레인) -> WP2 P1/P2 수정+회귀 테스트 -> WP3 최종 검증(tsc 0err, bun test >=1755 pass) + 논리 단위 커밋 + origin/dev 푸시. 범위 밖: 버전 범프, npm publish, devlog 삭제 복원.

workPhases.title: WP1 adversarial review of uncommitted diff (3 subagent lanes)

tasks.title: Lane A review: core routing/gate (features.ts, cli/v2.ts, bridge.ts, router.ts, config.ts, types.ts, providers)
Lane B review: server + management-api + usage/summary + reasoning-effort + openai-chat
Lane C review: cursor adapter (discovery, effort-map, live-transport, request-builder) + GUI pages
Synthesize findings (REVIEW-SYNTHESIS-01): per-blocker RCA, accept/rebut, fix plan

workPhases.title: WP2 fix all accepted P1/P2 findings with regression tests

tasks.title: Implement fixes for accepted P1/P2 findings
Reviewer re-verification of blocker closures (same reviewer, followup_task)

workPhases.title: WP3 final verification + logical commits + push to origin/dev

tasks.title: Full gate: bun x tsc --noEmit (0 errors) + bun test ./tests/ (>= baseline 1755 pass, 0 fail)
Split work into logical commits on dev
Push to origin/dev and confirm push output

criteria.scenario: Adversarial review of the full uncommitted diff completed across all three lanes with a written synthesis
criteria.expectedEvidence: Findings list with severity per lane + synthesis notes (accept/rebut per finding) recorded in ledger/devlog

criteria.scenario: Every accepted P1/P2 finding is fixed and covered by a passing regression test
criteria.expectedEvidence: Per-finding fix commit/diff reference + test name that fails before/passes after

criteria.scenario: Full verification gate passes on the final tree
criteria.expectedEvidence: tsc --noEmit exit 0 and bun test output showing >= 1755 pass / 0 fail on the committed tree

criteria.scenario: Work is committed in logical units on dev and pushed to origin/dev
criteria.expectedEvidence: git log of new commits + successful git push output to origin/dev
